creator: mdw@freebsd.org
text:
Could you please merge my old Bugzilla account mdw@freebsd.org (former m@mmap.at) with this one.

Background:
I was a GSoC student in 2015, without commit bit. A few weeks ago I could not login into my Bugzilla with my @freebsd.org account, because I forgot the password and could not reset it without access to the FreeBSD cluster. Bugmeisters helped me by merging a newly created account and my existing freebsd.org account.
I now tried to change my mail address to mdw@freebsd.org, because Bugzilla mails were still sent to my old email account and not to my @freebsd.org one. This locked me out of my account again.

Thanks,
Manuel
